text.title: Team AI Usage Policy Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-usage-policy-team methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-tools-and-data
step.action: Catalogue every AI tool used + every sensitive data category. Map tools × categories.

step.name: draft-three-lists
step.action: Convert green-cells into always-OK, red-cells into never-OK, amber-cells into ask-first.

step.name: name-owner-and-cadence
step.action: Assign single named owner + Slack channel + quarterly review date.

step.name: write-ir-runbook
step.input: Existing IR plan + Slack escalation paths
step.action: 4-step runbook with role + SLA per step. Test with a fire-drill.
step.decision-gate: If fire-drill exceeds 60 min container time, runbook is too vague — revise.

step.name: publish-and-train
step.action: Publish in repo + wiki. Add to new-hire onboarding. Schedule quarterly review.
step.output: Policy live; team trained; review wired
